name: Surrounded
short_description: A 6-player open world horror game. Explore a abandoned town, filled with mysteries, be chased around with your friends and survive creatures capable of ending your life. Uncover what really happened.
detailed_description:
Co-Op Story Mode

Explore Echofield

➢ Explore an immersive open-world with up to 6 players and uncover the dark history of Echofield. Make sure not to get caught by whatever might be lurking there…

Uncover Lost Lore

➢ Find items that shed light on the happenings of Echofield and piece together the story.

Interactive World

➢ The Surrounded world is fully dynamic and explorable, you can access every single door, interact with most items, and a lot more.

The Creature AI

➢ Our creatures react to sounds they hear! Make sure to stay quiet while you search and explore the huge open-world map that awaits you!

And so, so much more.

30 years ago, a remote laboratory researching black matter and dark energy had a complete system meltdown, causing it, and the surrounding forest & village to become affected. Back then the government sent in agents to survey the destruction and to check for survivors. They were never seen or heard from again. Eventually the government sent agents to contain any possible infection, sealing off the area and warning any remaining residents to never enter this place.

Today, 30 years later, you and your friends heard rumors of monsters roaming these woods. Rumors of shadows lurking in the woods, of eerie sounds coming from the ground… But you, my friend, are facing that danger with your friends, head on. Go my friend, prove that you are in fact, not Surrounded by monsters lurking in the dark.

Discord Server

The discord server will contain everything you need to know about this game, including sneak peeks while the game is in early development.

Any of your questions can be answered, and you’re also able to give us some of your ideas on what you’d like to see in the game.

Come talk to us here:
